events.name: bg-wc:ready
events.description: Preset loaded and first frame rendered. detail: { preset, renderer }.

events.name: bg-wc:error
events.description: Load / init / runtime failure. detail: { phase, error }.

events.name: bg-wc:preset-changed
events.description: The `preset` attribute changed. detail: { from, to }.

events.name: bg-wc:visibility
events.description: Element entered or left the viewport. detail: { visible }.

cssParts.name: canvas
cssParts.description: The rendered background canvas (webgl / canvas2d presets).

declarations.name: FAMILIES
declarations.default: { planner: [star, arrow, check, dottedUnderline, sparkle, banner], botanical: [sprig, heart, leaf, vine], geometric: [box, triangle, divider, circle, dotCluster], }

declarations.name: QUAD_VS
declarations.default: ` attribute vec2 a_pos; varying vec2 v_uv; void main() { v_uv = a_pos * 0.5 + 0.5; gl_Position = vec4(a_pos, 0.0, 1.0); }`
